overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a foggy, storm-lit urban plaza in a cyberpunk city at night. The player character moves through a basketball court area with palm trees, past large digital billboards, and ascends stairs into a covered homeless encampment under a bridge. The atmosphere is dense with orange-hued fog and neon lighting, characteristic of the game Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy waterfront promenade with industrial buildings

events.description: camera passes two standing pedestrians on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a foggy path beside an industrial building, approaching an open plaza area

notable_agents.action: two figures standing and conversing near a fence, illuminated by distant lights

entered.detail: dark industrial structure with red accent lighting and corrugated metal walls
tall palm trees silhouetted against the orange foggy sky
metal fence running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night with an orange storm sky. The camera moves along a concrete path beside an industrial building with red lights, passing two NPCs standing near a fence. Palm trees are visible through the dense fog in the distance, establishing a dystopian coastal urban atmosphere.

events.description: moves from narrow path onto open basketball court with painted lines visible on ground

agents.ego_description: walking across the basketball court, turning to survey the open area and surrounding buildings

entered.detail: outdoor court with white painted lines on dark asphalt surface
tiered metal seating structure along the right side of the court

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide basketball court surrounded by palm trees and industrial buildings. The camera moves across the asphalt surface, revealing metal bleachers on the right. The orange fog creates a hazy atmosphere with limited visibility to the surrounding structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with large digital advertisements

events.description: large illuminated digital billboards become visible on building wall, casting bright light

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza perimeter, observing the large digital advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large illuminated screens displaying advertisements for food items, possibly burritos or wraps
tall metal barrier with horizontal bars near the basketball court

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of the plaza where large digital billboards illuminate the fog with bright food advertisements. A metal fence structure appears on the right, and more pedestrians become visible walking through the area. The lighting shifts to a more commercial neon atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with stairs leading to underpass

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend wide concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing a wide set of concrete stairs while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs carrying a bag

entered.detail: wide set of concrete stairs leading upward to a covered area
large neon pink sign with text reading 'WATSON WHORE' on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide staircase flanked by digital billboards and a prominent neon pink 'WATSON WHORE' sign. Pedestrians move up and down the stairs as the camera begins to ascend, transitioning from the open plaza toward a covered underpass area.

events.description: enters covered tunnel underpass revealing a makeshift camp with tents and temporary shelters

agents.ego_description: ascending the final steps and entering a covered underpass area with a homeless encampment

notable_agents.action: person sitting near a tent in the encampment area

entered.detail: covered concrete underpass with red emergency lighting and blue atmospheric lighting
makeshift shelters and camping tents set up along the right wall of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera completes the ascent and enters a covered underpass tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights and blue atmospheric lighting. The space contains a homeless encampment with tents and temporary shelters set up along the walls, creating a stark contrast to the commercial plaza below. The scene ends looking deeper into the foggy tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial zone that gradually opens into a brightly lit commercial plaza. It begins on a concrete path beneath an orange storm sky, gliding past an industrial building with red lights and NPCs standing by a fence. As the camera moves forward, the narrow path expands into a wide basketball court where palm trees and metal bleachers emerge from the dense, hazy atmosphere. The scene then shifts toward the edge of the plaza, where the orange fog is pierced by the neon glow of large digital billboards advertising food. Finally, the camera passes a metal fence and several pedestrians, as the lighting transforms from a moody industrial gloom into a vibrant, commercial neon environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, commercial urban plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a sheltered underpass. It begins by approaching a wide staircase flanked by glowing digital billboards and a prominent neon pink sign, moving past pedestrians as the camera starts its ascent. As the climb concludes, the open air of the plaza gives way to the enclosed environment of a covered tunnel. The scene then shifts from the bright commercial lights to a dim atmosphere illuminated by red emergency beacons and blue atmospheric lighting, revealing a homeless encampment of tents and temporary shelters lining the walls. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the foggy tunnel, leaving the city's neon glow behind.
